access_types.name: Pointer
access_types.code: type Pointer is access all Element;

subprograms.code: function "+" (Left : Pointer;   Right : ptrdiff_t) return Pointer
function "+" (Left : ptrdiff_t; Right : Pointer)   return Pointer
function "-" (Left : Pointer;   Right : Pointer)   return ptrdiff_t
function "-" (Left : Pointer;   Right : ptrdiff_t) return Pointer

subprograms.name: Copy_Array
Copy_Terminated_Array
Value
Value
Virtual_Length

formals.name: Element_Array
formals.code: type Element_Array is array (Index range <>) of aliased Element;
